quotes: Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave.
The ink of the scholar is more sacred than the blood of the martyr.
Read! In the name of your Lord.
He who seeks knowledge, Allah will make his path to Paradise easy.
Indeed, with every difficulty, there is relief.
Be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth.
Verily, with hardship, there is ease.
Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor].
And remember, with gratitude, Allah will increase you.
Contentment is the greatest wealth.
Whoever is not grateful to people is not grateful to Allah.
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.
Allah is with the patient.
Verily, after every difficulty, there is relief.
Optimism is a sunnah.
There is no one who goes out of his house in order to seek knowledge, but the angels lower their wings in approval of his actions.
When Allah wills good for a person, He causes him to understand the religion.
Whoever calls people to guidance, will have a similar reward to those who follow him, without any sort of decrease in his rewards.
By Allah, if Allah guides aright even one person through you, that is better for you than to possess the red (most valuable) camels.
The most excellent of you is the one who learns the Quran and teaches it.
Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge by degrees.
